title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 6, 2026
summary: Added two new daily event files covering the late March to early April window. March 31 captures Bad Bunny becoming one of only two artists in history (alongside The Weeknd) to have 30 songs surpass 1 billion Spotify streams each, with "EoO" from *Debí Tirar Más Fotos* as the milestone track. April 4 covers the Sony Pictures bidding war for "The Comebacker" heating up and the Adidas BadBo 1.0 "Rise" confirming a full retail sell-out with resale at $230+. The timeline was expanded with the Spotify 30-songs milestone entry and a new KPI tracking songs with 1B+ streams (30) was added. Meta daycount and heroHeadline updated.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Apr 2, 2026
summary: Added a new daily event file (March 28) covering the official global launch of the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 "Rise" colorway. The timeline was expanded with the March 28 sneaker launch entry and the March 27 Comebacker film report was enriched with a second Hypebeast source and production details. A new KPI for Spotify Monthly Listeners (110.4M, late March 2026) was added reflecting post-Grammy/Super Bowl elevated levels. Meta daycount and subtitle updated to reflect the European tour leg beginning May 2026.

title: Bad Bunny Tracker Update — Mar 27, 2026
summary: Added five new timeline entries covering the post-Super Bowl streaming surge (Feb 9), the Tokyo Spotify Japan debut on March 7 during the Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour, the Adidas x Bad Bunny BadBo 1.0 sneaker global registration opening on March 24, and a Variety report of Bad Bunny being eyed for a supporting role in Tom Hanks' baseball film 'The Comebacker.' The discography/political section was expanded with Lady Gaga and Ricky Martin, both Super Bowl LX halftime surprise guests. Daily event files were created for March 24 and March 27.
